generatedFrom: Figma Plugin API — figma.getLocalTextStylesAsync() + variable resolution
note: Snapshot of the 36 text styles imported from Prism3/engine/out/nb.tokens.json into Figma. Each property records whether it is bound to a Figma variable, which variable, and the resolved value across every mode of that variable's collection. Non-bindable properties (textDecoration, textCase) are always baked. fontStyle is currently baked because the engine has no fontStyle primitive — it is derived from the numeric weight-role at import time.

font.description: Font primitives — font-family (STRING), font-size (FLOAT, 22 steps 10→160px), font-weight (FLOAT, 100→900), font-weight-role (FLOAT, aliased to numeric weight)

font-fluid.description: Fluid font-size primitives — one FLOAT variable per fluid composite; mobile & desktop have distinct values. Bound as fontSize on the 10 fluid text styles.

bakedByDesign.textDecoration: Not variable-bindable in Figma; used to render underlines on *-link variants.
bakedByDesign.textCase: Not variable-bindable in Figma; used to render uppercase on eyebrow.
bakedByDesign.lineHeight: Engine emits an unitless multiplier (e.g. 1.5×); Figma binds line-height as px. Baked per composite (fontSize × multiplier at desktop size).
bakedByDesign.letterSpacing: Engine emits em (e.g. -0.02em); Figma binds letter-spacing as px. Baked per composite (fontSize × em at desktop size).
bakedByDesign.fontStyle: Engine has no fontStyle primitive — the numeric weight-role is the source. The string is derived at import (400→"Regular", 600→"Semi Bold", 700→"Bold", 300→"Light"; JetBrains Mono lacks "Semi Bold", so 600→"Medium"). fontStyle is technically bindable in Figma but is not bound here.
